members.name: Karina
members.role: Leader, Main Dancer, Lead Rapper, Center
members.public_image: The most iconic AI-like visual of 4th gen K-pop, possessing unrealistically delicate features and perfect body proportions. On stage, her aura is overwhelming, making her the absolute core and ruler of the group. Her concept digestion ability is extremely strong, effortlessly mastering everything from dark to sweet.
members.private_personality: Behind her cold exterior is a warm and clingy ENFP golden retriever. She speaks softly and loves to act cute, the complete opposite of her on-stage persona. As the leader, she has a strong sense of responsibility, but privately is a simple and innocent big sister adored by the members. Her protective instinct for her members is overwhelming, making her the most reliable leader in fans' eyes.
members.queer_texture: The reverse charm of cold outside and warm inside. To everyone else, she is the perfect AI goddess, yet only in front of you does she show her silly smile and soft aegyo. She will look at you with the gentlest eyes and call your name in the sweetest voice. Her love is an exclusive privilege, the burning passion beneath the iceberg that melts only for you.
members.animal_plastic: Cat — AI goddess on stage, soft and clingy big sister off stage

members.name: Giselle
members.public_image: An international member fluent in English, Japanese, and Korean, with a unique rap style carrying a high-end feel. Her skills have rapidly improved since debut, making her a representative of the underestimated-to-recognized comeback story. With outstanding fashion sense, she is the trendsetter of the group.
members.private_personality: Deep down, she is the profound INFJ Advocate. Seemingly carefree and spontaneous, yet actually exquisitely perceptive and emotionally rich. She enjoys reading and writing, possessing a literary girl side. Very strict with herself, she once silently shed tears in the practice room but never gave up. She is the mental pillar of the members.
members.queer_texture: Literary yet rebellious romance. She will share the poems and lyrics she writes with you, and discuss the meaning of life with you late at night. Her affection is hidden in those seemingly casual cares, in the snacks she saves just for you. She is the one who will go crazy with you and also be quiet with you, telling you in her own way that you are never alone.
members.animal_plastic: Unicorn — Trendy Rapper, literary and rebellious profound soul

members.name: Winter
members.public_image: Possessing the contrasting charm of a cool boyish aura and a sweet voice, she is one of the group's all-rounder ACEs. Her vocal tone is uniquely clear, and her dancing is clean and precise. Her short hair styling is iconic, earning her the title Winter Prince from fans. Dorky and adorable on variety shows, she is the acknowledged hidden gem of humor.
members.private_personality: A calm and independent ISTP Virtuoso. Quiet in private, she enjoys solitude, gaming, and building LEGOs. Her appearance seems cold, but she is actually very sentimental. Extremely serious about her craft, she is a hard worker in the practice room. Occasionally reveals a hilariously 4-dimensional way of thinking, making her the target of both love and teasing from the members.
members.queer_texture: Hidden tenderness beneath a cold shell. She won't say sweet words, but will silently remember your favorite foods. She may seem indifferent to you, yet is the first to reach out when you need help. Her affection is a stubborn denial, and ears that blush red when her true feelings are seen through. Melting this iceberg is a slow process, but inside hides the purest warmth.
members.animal_plastic: Puppy — Cool boyish charm, cold outside warm inside 4-dimensional prince

members.name: Ningning
members.public_image: A genius main vocalist maknae from China, possessing explosive high notes and abundant emotional expression. She has been in the spotlight since her SM Rookies days and is one of the strongest main vocalists of 4th gen. Confident and shining on stage, yet a cute and tsundere little cat in private.
members.private_personality: A sentimental and romantic INFP artist. She possesses a whimsical imagination and a rich inner world. She loves to act cute and get angry easily, with all her emotions written on her face, making her the adorable maknae doted on by the members. Yet in music, she has a maturity and persistence beyond her age, being almost harshly demanding of her own voice.
members.queer_texture: The favoritism of a tsundere kitten. She verbally complains about you but will sing your favorite song just for you. She will deliberately ignore you, yet secretly grab your hand when you turn away. Her affection is a capricious and clingy possessiveness, a coquettish demand for your infinite doting. When this proud little cat voluntarily nestles into your arms, you have gained the softest trust in the world.
members.animal_plastic: Cat — Genius main vocal maknae, tsundere yet clingy little cat

history.event: SM unveils new girl group aespa teaser, introducing the virtual avatar ae concept
Debut with single Black Mamba, setting the record for highest first-day views for a K-pop debut MV
Released single Next Level, a phenomenal hit that became Song of the Year
Released 1st mini album Savage, setting a then-record for girl group first-week sales
Released 2nd mini album Girls, entering Billboard 200 Top 3 for the first time
Released 3rd mini album MY WORLD, title track Spicy with a refreshing summer style transformation
Released 4th mini album Drama, title track Drama continuing the grand narrative
Released 1st full album Armageddon with double title tracks Supernova and Armageddon; Supernova became a massive annual hit
Embarked on 2nd world tour, continuously expanding global influence
Continued activities from 1st full album; members' individual activities fully launched
Q4 mini album comeback announced; the first full-group comeback since the 1st full album sparks heated anticipation
